Name: DeckShift
Author: Beennnn
Description: Switch Stream Deck profiles by name and hide/show/toggle the config window — reliably, even while the editor is open.

Actions.Name: Switch Profile
Actions.Tooltip: Switch to a profile by name — works even with the editor open.

Actions.Name: Hide Editor
Actions.Tooltip: Close the Stream Deck configuration window.

Actions.Name: Show Editor
Actions.Tooltip: Open the Stream Deck configuration window.

Actions.Name: Toggle Editor
Actions.Tooltip: Toggle the Stream Deck configuration window.
